name: Road to the NHL Winter Classic
original_name: Road to the NHL Winter Classic
overview: An exclusive look at the players and coaches in their professional and personal settings, following the chosen teams as they prepare for their respective outdoor games capturing all the action, camaraderie, drama, humor, heartaches and triumphs as they unfold.

trailers.title: 24/7 Penguins Capitals: Road to the NHL Winter Classic Trailer (HBO)
